reviews.review_title: Fun Slots and Great Customer Service
reviews.review_description:
Thank you for responding and fixing Hot Stuff. Played 100 rounds  and it worked like a charm. Great customer service n

I like the movie theme of these slots.  it’s original and fun.  i like that you have lots going on (bots, falling coins to catch, floating flamingos and bow &arrow gaming), much entertainment. The best surprise for me was the VP Jaws game 🤩 when in the cage. I would like to see several video poker games added   (dd poker , spin poker, etc.) . Love the casino 😍

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you so much for the 5-star vibes and such a detailed review. We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the movie themes and all the "extra" fun like the falling coins and the bow & arrow mini-games! And yes—that Jaws VP cage experience is one of our favorites too! 🦈

Regarding the Hot Stuff machines: We sincerely apologize for the freezing issues you've encountered. Our engineering team is already investigating the cause to ensure a smooth "spin" for everyone.

Also, thank you for the suggestions on Double Down and Spin Poker! We are always looking to expand our library, and player requests like yours go straight to our design team's roadmap. Stay tuned for future updates!

Update: We have clearly heard your feedback regarding the "Hot Stuff" machine. Our team has taken corrective actions to ensure smooth operation. If the problem persists or you encounter more issues, please contact info@risingdigital.com. We will handle it immediately! Additionally, we have provided you with 500,000 gold coins as an apology.

reviews.review_description: I love love winning dragons. The dragons are awesome and I won alot on the games.. graphics are perfect. Can't wait for the site to be completely on line!

developer_response.body: Thank you for loving our game. We would introduce more fantastic creatures to our Casino. Have Fun and Win a Lot!

reviews.review_description: Really needs an update. Stuck on St Patrick's Day. No way to adjust standing in front of the machines instead of in them. Height / screen adjustment puts the slots 10 feet under you. Would be nice to use trigger to spin like in some casinos.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Yes, we are improving our games, and the spin will definitely improve.  Sorry for the delay; it's usually due to an outdated version.  Could you try updating the game and try it again? We are here to help and ensure your playing experience is enjoyable. Please have fun and win huge!!!

reviews.review_description: So far Winning Dragon brings bits and pieces of the Las Vegas strip to you. It is the only vr game that feels authentic just because you can look out of your suite windows and see most of the iconic scenery of the Vegas strip. I wish it had more floors and casino games. Your private suite is pretty empty... just three portals to travel to your gaming destination. Another thing that is nice is the dual way you can get more credits or vip passes.. i would like to gift items and transport to other casinos  in the game that have more resemblance to Las Vegas.  Hope to see more in the future.  Great VR gaming experience so far.
Game is amazing needs more games in lobby but W game overall if you like casino games, this is the one for you!

developer_response.body: Thank you for loving our games. Hope you have fun in our casino and win a lot!

reviews.review_description: Great casino for just starting, can't wait to see what more will be added! i have been with this game app since the beginning and it just keeps growing.  love the new ViP room but i am noticing the machines are a lot slower to stopping and some times they just keep spinning indefinitely and i have to leave the app and restart it. And a few suggests would be, to be able to ajust the heights of the machines better and let the player ajust how long they want the auto spin to go. Also to be able to click on a player quickly to mute them. So many kids in VR and they find it entertaining to scream at people🤷‍♀️ the only other thing is to start a FB group so we have a way to communicate with the team and others when problems arise or just to share how much fun we are having.

Most of these games are fun and pay out regularly.  Shooting the balloons is fun but hard to catch the timing sometimes.  Still learning how to get a VIP pass and other features  but it’s overall a good experience.

I found Winning Dragons over the weekend while looking for something new in VR, and it’s a pretty solid experience!
​Out of all the games I play, Frankenstein and Jaws are my absolute favorites. I love the classic monster vibes and the high stakes of those two, so I wasn't sure if this app would hold my attention but it has! It's now my go to game.  I hope you will be adding more games in the future. Add more games it gets old fast
Love the graphics and the sound effects. When you hit a big win, the whole screen goes crazy. It’s a total blast.

Love the variety of the movie theme slot machines, VP Underwater
 Jaws, and the VP Casino Jurassic Park, the Mummy, Frankenstein.
  It's cool place to spend your day!
You can really see the progress with updates.The game keeps getting better.
I really enjoy the archery activities in it. The experience of archery is very realistic, and you can also obtain gold coins and VIP tickets.
I really love the Jurassic Park-themed machines in the VIP room. Especially the dinosaur scenes after winning the prize left a very strong impression on me.

Very good animation and play. Lots of mindless fun and just like a real casino you can sometimes lose money. It has a great feature as a money tree where on the hour you can replenish your stash. It's still in progress and has a screen freeze occasionally Where you have to do a reset from time to time.

developer_response.body:
Dear jomama,

Thank you so much for your thoughtful five-star review! Your appreciation for the game's animations, gameplay, and Money Tree feature—especially that sense of “effortless fun”—is precisely the core experience we aim to deliver to every player. We've noted the screen freezing issue you mentioned, and our team is actively optimizing the game to provide you with a smoother, more stable experience.

To express our gratitude for your valuable feedback and patience, we've prepared a special surprise reward for you! We hope this little gift adds extra luck and enjoyment to your next login. ✨

Wishing you joyful gaming and abundant rewards! 🐉🎰

The WinningDragons

reviews.review_description: this game is absolutely fun but it be of a lot more fun if it had trigger squeezing
Jaws Machine is Epic!
Great  graphics and fun animations
Got to play it once and would never let me back in game just kept thinking

developer_response.body:
Hi FluffyChinchilla3862,

We're sorry to hear about your experience. We definitely don't want you stuck outside the game! Please drop us a line at Info@risingdigital.com so our team can help you troubleshoot the loading issue immediately. We'd love to get you back to the tables!

reviews.review_description: I recently downloaded the game and tried to play it. I get stuck staring at the winning dragons logo loading screen for eternity. I have tried resetting the app, resetting the headset, and removing and re downloading the game and still the same thing.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out, and we are so sorry to hear you are experiencing this issue. We know how frustrating it is to be stuck on the loading screen, especially after you've already taken the time to reinstall the game and restart your headset.

Our development team is currently investigating this bug. To help us get to the bottom of it as quickly as possible, could you please let us know which specific headset model you are using and your current system OS version?

Thank you for your patience and for giving Winning Dragons a try. We are working hard to resolve this so you can get into the game soon!

Best regards,
The Winning Dragons Team

reviews.review_description: Amazing game lot of fun

developer_response.body:
Dear Jaxcar34,

Thank you for your five-star review and enthusiastic recommendation! Learning that you found pure enjoyment in The WinningDragons has truly inspired our team. To express our gratitude for your support, we've prepared a special surprise reward for you! May this gift add even more excitement and joy to your adventures. ✨

We remain dedicated to creating more exciting content, and your recognition is our greatest motivation. We look forward to delivering an even better gaming experience for you in the future!

Happy gaming, and may luck always be on your side! 🐉🎰

The WinningDragons

reviews.review_description: Love the visual effects on the slots

reviews.review_title: Easy to Play, Hard to Put Down
reviews.review_description: Very user-friendly controls and a relaxing atmosphere. Perfect for both beginners and experienced players.

I have been playing this game for a while now and is great to see how it's growing.  The time that the slots take to spin went a bit cuckoo for a while taking 20-25 seconds to stop but this has been sorted :-)  The sharks on the Jaws slot machine are presently big pink blobs and the up and down of the screen doesn't work properly.  But well done on the decor (Halloween Stuff) - great job.  Look forward to see what's coming next.  Thank you  (LdyRiver)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for sticking with us! We’re really glad to hear you’ve been enjoying our game and noticed the improvements.
Our team has already been working on the visual issue with the Jaws slot machine, and the fix will go live later today.🎃
We’re thrilled you liked the Halloween decorations, and there’s even more fun stuff on the way soon! We truly appreciate your support

reviews.review_description: Decent selection of machines, each feels a bit different.

20 spins and out of coins would not let me change bet was stuck on max bet. Don't 
 waste time with this game

developer_response.body:
Dear Dave,

First, we sincerely apologize for the unpleasant experience during your gameplay. Thank you for playing our game and providing such detailed feedback.

Our machines are set with a default minimum bet of 100, and the bet size can be adjusted using the buttons on the machine.

Regarding your statement, “20 spins and out of coins would not let me change bet was stuck on max bet,” we would like to understand the specific details of this occurrence. It would be helpful if you could provide your email address so we can communicate with you directly.

Understanding your specific situation will help us resolve your issue and optimize the game experience. As compensation for your unpleasant experience, we have prepared a mystery gift package for you, which will be sent once we receive your reply.

The WinningDragons

reviews.review_description:
Crisp graphics, environment is set up nicely and mechanics work well. I really like this game - feels like you’re at an actual casino, especially with real movie themed machines. Looking forward to future updates and additional games. 

Developers - could you add some “old school” slot machines with pull levers? That would be really fun and unique

I will be playing this game any time I want a quick casino thrill

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing such positive feedback with us. We’re delighted to hear that you’re enjoying the game, and we truly appreciate your support. Your suggestion about adding “old school” slot machines with pull levers is excellent—we love hearing creative ideas from our players, and we’ll be sure to share this with our development team for consideration in future updates.

We’re also excited to let you know that we’ve recently launched a new VIP Casino Room featuring three brand-new slot games. 🎉By signing in for seven consecutive days, you can claim a VIP Ticket and unlock access to these exciting new titles.

Your ‘CROWN’ and mystery rewards are ready for you in the game, and happy spinning！🎁

reviews.review_description: This game sucks so bad Don't  waste ur space downloading it the payouts are trash the lobbies are dead they should just take it off the store

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear that your experience with the game has not met your expectations. We value all feedback, including criticism, as it helps us identify areas for improvement. 😊Our team is continually working to optimize payouts, enhance gameplay, and create more engaging lobbies. 
Meanwhile, we’ve just launched a new VIP Casino Room with three brand-new slot games. 🎉By signing in for seven consecutive days, you can claim a VIP Ticket and get access to these exciting new titles. We hope you’ll give them a try and see the improvements we’re making. Hoping your next max bet brings a massive win!💰

reviews.review_description: This game is one of three slot games I play and it is pretty good.  I do feel on most machines I loose far more than I win.  My major problem with the game is when I go up to the machine it’s like I am way above the machine. I play seated so when I try to adjust the height of the machine I can’t get to the buttons to make the machine higher. The only way I can do it is to sit on the edge of my chair to align myself but when I sit back I can’t reach the spin button. I do not have any issues with the other two slot games I play getting lined up to the machine correctly    Also as I saw another person say that every time I play the jaws game when it’s going to bonus it freezes and I can’t do anything but leave the machine. Graphics are nice and I like the themes of the games as they are the licensed familiar  characters I grew up watching

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback with us. We’re glad to hear that you enjoy the graphics and themes, and we truly appreciate your loyalty to our slot games. We’re sorry to learn about the alignment issue and the freezing problem with the Jaws bonus feature. Our team will investigate these concerns to ensure a smoother and more enjoyable experience for all players.

We’re also excited to let you know that our new VIP Casino Room has just launched, featuring three brand-new slot games. 🎉You can also claim a VIP Ticket by signing in for seven consecutive days, which will give you access to enjoy these exciting new titles. 

Thank you again for your support—we look forward to seeing you in the new VIP Casino Room!🎰

reviews.review_title: I got Robbed! This game took my money!
reviews.review_description: This is actually a beautiful place. The graphics are good, and it feels like you're in there. The Setup is Nice! Reminds me of Vegas Infinite. The slot machines look legit fun and real. They provided me with 100,000 free coins and you get free coins from the daily star 🌟 as well. Those Free coins didn't last me very long. So I purchased some diamonds 💎 to transfer into coins so I can continue  playing... I was having fun and everything was great. I hit the Bonus game on the "Jaws"  slot machine and I was winning Big. Note: The bonus game features some really cool effects. 🦈  So after I won Big!  I hit the Spin and the machine went into a never ending spin... it just kept spinning and spinning and spinning. So I pointed my controller over to the other Jaws machine next to me and figured I would move over there. Once I did. I noticed right away that all of my winnings were gone.  I went back to the original Jaws machine hoping my winnings were still there. But, Nope! Nothing I got Robbed!   I was having a great time playing until this happened. I actually think this could be a place I would visit everyday. But, It definitely needs some work. I don't like this experience I just had. I wasted real money to get fake money only to have my winnings...Taken away! I feel like I've been Robbed! This my friends is not a good feeling. 😕

developer_response.body:
We Promise To Make It Right !!

To investigate this further, we’d like to look into your account and game logs. The ID you used to leave the review is not in our data system. Our team is ready to assist you at: Info@risingdigital.com. Just include your ID and a brief description of the issue, and we’ll prioritize resolving this for you. 

Thank you for your detailed feedback. We’re genuinely sorry for the frustrating experience you had. We take these matters seriously and will do everything possible to ensure your gameplay remains smooth and fair moving forward. 

Winning Dragons Team.

reviews.review_description: Played again after being unbanned to why I still don’t know why and don’t think I was the only one. Anyway this game is hands down the best slot game out there machines run smooth some minor bugs like machines freezing which can be fixed by logging out then return to same machine, sure this can be fixed easily and can’t wait for table games well done at making a very good game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your incredible review! 🌟 We’re honored you consider us the best VR slot game – that’s what we strive for daily!

Good news:
The machine freezing issue you mentioned has been fixed in our latest update! No more logout workarounds needed – just seamless spinning. 🔄🎰
Table games are coming soon – your excitement just got us even more pumped to launch them! 🎲✨

We sincerely appreciate your patience. Our team has reviewed and adjusted moderation protocols to prevent similar situations. Welcome back – we’re glad you’re here!

Thanks for being part of what makes this game great. Keep those reels rolling, and watch for exciting updates!

Winning Dragons Team

reviews.review_description: The game is great except it did not save any of the millions I had in my account. When I looked the next day I only had what I started out with. I had over 65 million in there and went down to 500,000 it would be greatif I looked in my account and my money was back in there.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback and for your kind words about the game. We’re glad to hear you enjoy playing, but we’re truly sorry for the confusion and frustration caused by the recent changes to your account balance.

We want to clarify that no money was lost in your account. We adjusted the denomination ratio from 100 credits to 1 coin, to 1 credit to 1 coin. This means that while your displayed balance on slot machines may appear lower (e.g., 65 million credits becoming 650,000 credits), the actual value of your coins remains the same. The change only affects the cost per spin and how your balance of the machine is displayed, not the value of your coins.

We understand how alarming this might have been and sincerely apologize for any concern it may have caused. To compensate for this, we’ve added a one-week VIP reward to our players. We hope this enhances your gaming experience and shows our commitment to your satisfaction. 

Thank you for your understanding and continued support. We appreciate you being part of our community!

reviews.review_description: the slots have amazing graphics and fun bonus games, i will say that when im spinning on max bet ($10k) it sometimes only bets $1K and my payouts are matching that, so theres always that small chance i hit free spins on a $1K bet when im doing max. also jaws bonus sometimes freezes or breaks after the shark breaks through the picture for a jumpscare.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed review! It’s fantastic that you enjoy the amazing graphics and fun bonus games. However, we completely understand your frustration with the betting issue. That’s worth addressing, as it can impact your potential payouts and overall experience. 
The freezing or glitching during the Jaws bonus sounds like a buzzkill. These are excellent points for the developers to investigate, and we hope they can smooth out these issues soon to make the gameplay even more seamless. 
Thanks for sharing your feedback—players like you help make the game better for everyone. Hoping your next max bet brings a massive win! Your ‘CROWN’  👑and mystery rewards are ready for you in the game and happy spinning. 🎰🦈💰

reviews.review_description:
hope more content is released, very good slots.

Unfortunately the game has been offline for over 24 hours. You cant load the spaceship and if you can which works rarely the slots cant be played.
I assume they are working on a big update.

developer_response.body:
We’re glad to hear you see the game's great potential and are enjoying the slots—it’s awesome to know you’re having fun with them! We truly appreciate your patience and understanding at this early stage. You’re right; the team is likely working hard behind the scenes on updates and improvements to make the experience even better.

Thanks again for your support and for sticking with us. Your "Crown" 👑and mystery gifts ✨💎✨will be ready for you. Stay tuned—big things are coming! 🚀🎰✨

reviews.review_description: Absolutely the best casino game.Graphics are amazing and the bonus games are so much fun.I love swimming with the shark and riding the floaties.Recommend this game ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your fantastic review! 😊 We’re thrilled you consider this the best casino game—it means a lot to us! The shark and floating flamingos are designed to keep the excitement going, and it’s awesome to know you’re enjoying them so much. Your recommendation is the ultimate compliment, and we’re so glad you’re having a great time. Hints for you: try to use the “MEAT” (which can be found in tools) in the VIP room, and enjoy more fun🦈🦈🦈. We prepared some ✨💎✨ for you to enjoy.
Your “Crown” and mystery gift are ready. Keep spinning, swimming, and riding —there’s plenty more fun to come! 🎰🏄‍♂️✨

reviews.review_description: How do you get picked for early access

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great review and your question! 😊 You are definitely qualified for early access. Just download the game now and enjoy. Welcome to share your thoughts, and here is the royal ‘Crown’👑 and mystery gift waiting for you in the game.

reviews.review_description: Not sure what's going on but when I play Jaws it freezes and then it just doesn't let me play none of the games not sure if they're working on it but this is just my fourth day playing it I'll try to hang in there and give it a little time to see what happens

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for giving the game a chance! 😊 We’re thrilled you’re enjoying it so far, and we sincerely apologize for the freezing issues —that’s not the experience we want for you. Our team is actively working on fixes, so your patience is essential.

To help us investigate further, could you share your in-game ID with us? This way, we can look into your specific session and work on resolving the issue faster.  We want to give you some mystery rewards that also require your ID. We appreciate your feedback and hope to make your gameplay smoother very soon! Hang in there—we’ve got exciting updates on the way. 🦈🎰

Our support team email - info@risingdigital.com

reviews.review_description: I can tell that the developers mean well and want to provide a fun VR casino experience, but it’s like they’ve never been to a real casino. The slots games are somewhat unrealistic with very inauthentic buttons, and the $10k credits they gave me went absolutely nowhere. The graphics of the games are passable, but have a very uninspired feel and design. This whole game needs a rewrite and honestly, a new direction. The Universal franchises are cool, but it seems like it’s all they’re banking on. No way to get additional credits besides your daily /hourly bonus credits. Needs an overhaul and is a far cry from its main competitor Vegas Billionaire and other mobile slot games like DoubleDown or Monopoly Slots, which focus on authentic casino  slots.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback. We truly appreciate your insights and understand your frustrations with the game's current state. You’re clearly passionate about creating an authentic and enjoyable casino experience, and we share that goal.

We’re sorry that the gameplay and design fell short of your expectations. Your comments about the unrealistic slot mechanics, uninspired graphics, and limited credit options are noted, and we’ll take them seriously as we continue to improve the game. We want to create an experience that feels fun and authentic, and your feedback helps us identify areas where we can improve.

The Universal franchises are a highlight, but we agree they shouldn’t be the only focus. We’re constantly working on new features, updates, and improvements to make the game more engaging and realistic. 

Thank you again for your constructive criticism. We’re committed to making the game the best it can be, and we hope you’ll give us another chance as we roll out updates and improvements. Your support means a lot to us, and we’re determined to deliver an experience you’ll love. 🎰✨

reviews.review_description: Pretty fun so far, but definitely in the earlier stages of development. Only a few people were in the lobbys I joined and did not seem to want to interact with my // or couldn't hear me. As of now, base of the game feels like an infinite clone but I'm hopeful they have some fresh ideas in the works. Liiiike, what's with the bartender in the pool? Still beta i imagine

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for jumping into the game! 😊 We’re glad to hear you’re having fun with the slots so far—it’s still early days, and we’re working hard to make the experience even better. We appreciate your patience as we continue to develop and refine the game.

You’re right that the lobbies can feel a bit quiet now. Interaction is a big part of the fun, so we’ll definitely look into ways to improve communication and make it easier for players to connect and chat. More surprises and polish of the bartender have been working on. We’re excited to share some fresh ideas and updates in the future. Stay tuned—there’s a lot more coming! 🎰✨

 😉 Thanks again for your support and for sharing your thoughts. Keep spinning those slots, and we hope to see you in the lobbies soon! 🦈🍹

reviews.review_description:
I’m not so sure about best slot, especially with Vegas Billionaire that was released back in December. The graphics on this game does not compare to Vegas billionaire. Feels dated and hard to enjoy with not being able to move the slot up and down. 

Feedback:
- adjustable slot is needed. No matter where I sat or adjusted my guardian I could not comfortable play without hitting my legs or constantly moving to play. 

- motion sickness. Many players get motion sickness on VR. I don’t like the feeling the spaceship is moving, especially sitting by the window. 

- bartender. What is she doing and what is the point of that space for a bartender looking crazy. You can’t even sit over there. Input some seats.  

- bank roll is not accurate. I had 900k, went to another slot machine and had 883k. 

Game needs some excitement. I feel like an old lady playing this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback—we truly appreciate the time you took to share your thoughts. Your insights are invaluable as we work to improve the game.

We understand that the slot machine's visuals and flexibility need improvement. We’re exploring updates to make the graphics more immersive. We're sorry to hear about the discomfort caused by the spaceship movement. A new room with less motion is coming soon. Our team is investigating ways to make the bartender area more functional and other areas reasonable.
The slot cabinets are adjustable. To improve your comfort, please click the chair button on the slot control panel and move up and down to adjust the slot positions.

We’re committed to making the game exciting and enjoyable for all players. We’d love for you to try the game once these improvements are live. Thank you again for your honesty—it helps us create a better experience for everyone.

reviews.review_description: The jaws slot is cool.   The credits take sooooo long to drop.    If you have a big win you can take a nap waiting for the credits.

developer_response.body:
Haha, you’re not wrong! 😆 The Jaws slot does love to build suspense when those credits drop—maybe a little too much! 🦈💰 We’ll pass this feedback along to the team to see if we can speed things up (or at least add a coffee break timer ☕⏳).

Glad you’re enjoying the game despite the slow-motion payouts! Keep hunting those big wins—just maybe keep a pillow handy for now. 😴🎉 Thanks for playing and sharing your thoughts!
